title: ValueAggregatorDescriptor.java
description:
The `UserDefinedValueAggregatorDescriptor.java` file contains a Java class that serves as a wrapper for user-defined value aggregators in Apache Hadoop MapReduce. It uses reflection to dynamically load and instantiate user-defined classes, enabling customization of aggregation logic. The class implements `ValueAggregatorDescriptor`, delegating method calls to the dynamically created aggregator instance. It takes a class name and a configuration object as inputs, and outputs a list of aggregation-id/value pairs. Dependencies include Hadoop's `ValueAggregatorDescriptor`, `Text`, and reflection classes.

---

TITLE: ValueAggregatorBaseDescriptor.java

DESCRIPTION:
The `ValueAggregatorBaseDescriptor.java` file provides a base class for implementing common functionalities of user-defined aggregators. It defines static constants for various aggregation types, a nested static class for handling key-value pairs, and methods for generating aggregation entries and value aggregators. The class depends on Hadoop's `mapreduce.lib.aggregate` package and standard Java collections.

---

TITLE: ValueAggregatorCombiner.java

DESCRIPTION:
The `ValueAggregatorCombiner.java` file implements a generic combiner for the Aggregate class in Apache Hadoop MapReduce. It processes key-value pairs, aggregates values for a given key, and outputs combined results. The combiner depends on Hadoop's `Text`, `Writable`, and `Reducer` classes, along with `Context` for output.

---

TITLE: ValueAggregatorJobBase.java

DESCRIPTION:
The `ValueAggregatorJobBase.java` file is an abstract class for implementing common functionalities of mapper, reducer, and combiner classes in Apache Hadoop MapReduce's aggregate library. It sets up and initializes aggregator descriptors based on configuration settings, using static methods to handle descriptor setup. It depends on `ValueAggregatorDescriptor`, `ValueAggregatorBaseDescriptor`, and Hadoop's `Configuration` class.

---

TITLE: ValueAggregatorReducer.java

DESCRIPTION:
The `ValueAggregatorReducer.java` file defines a Reducer class for Apache Hadoop MapReduce's ValueAggregator library. It processes key-value pairs, aggregates values based on their types, and generates a report for each aggregation type. The reducer depends on Hadoop's `Text`, `Writable`, `Reducer`, and `Context` classes, along with aggregation-related classes from `mapreduce.lib.aggregate`.
